name: Classic Sour Cream Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Combine the cookie crumbs and margarine; press firmly into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
4. Gradually add the sweetened condensed milk, beating until smooth.
5. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then fold in the sour cream and vanilla extract.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 50 to 55 minutes or until lightly browned around the edge (the center will be slightly soft).
8. Cool completely before serving.
9. Chill before garnishing as desired.
10. Refrigerate leftovers.
